Man City Reach League Cup Semi-Finals After 2–0 Win Over Brentford

Dec 18, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Man City Secures League Cup Semi-Final Spot

Man City confirmed their place in the League Cup semi-finals with a 2–0 win over Brentford, highlighting squad rotation, tactical control, and individual moments of brilliance. Guardiola’s rotated lineup maintained dominance despite early setbacks, reinforcing City’s depth and consistency across competitions.
